note: Provider-free export. No network calls or credentials are used to produce this file. An API-based importer must supply LINEAR_API_KEY and the target team id (LINEAR_TEAM_ID) at run time.
priorityModel: Linear priority: 0 None, 1 Urgent, 2 High, 3 Medium, 4 Low.

issues.title: Chunk 0 — Source-of-Truth Docs and Stale Doc Quarantine
issues.description:
Mark the current architecture and roadmap as authoritative, quarantine stale docs, and make the contributor reading path clear.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Current source-of-truth docs are listed before stale historical material.
- [ ] Stale local-MVP or cloud-heavy docs contain clear warning banners or archive notes.
- [ ] Root and docs README files direct new contributors to the authoritative architecture and roadmap.

## Test commands

- `npm test`
- `npm run build`

## Roadmap metadata

- Difficulty: beginner
- Good first issue: true
- Milestone: v0.1.0-alpha
